feat_haretrigger.name: Hare-Trigger
feat_haretrigger.description: You can add your proficiency bonus to your initiative rolls.

feat_leporine_senses.name: Leporine Senses
feat_leporine_senses.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

feat_lucky_footwork.name: Lucky Footwork
feat_lucky_footwork.description: When you fail a Dexterity saving throw, you can use your reaction to roll a d4 and add it to the save, potentially turning the failure into a success. You can't use this reaction if your speed is 0.

feat_rabbits_foot.name: Rabbit's Foot
feat_rabbits_foot.description: Once per long rest. when you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

feat_rabbit_hop.name: Rabbit Hop
feat_rabbit_hop.description: As a bonus action, you can make a horizontal jump equal to your movement speed or a vertical jump equal to half your movement speed, without provoking opportunity attacks. You can use this trait only if your speed is greater than 0. You can use it a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

races.name: Kouniklos
races.biology: Kouniklos are 0,60-1,10 meters tall, average 30 kg and are humanoids. Kouniklos reach adulthood at the age of 2 but are considered young until the age of 7. On average, they live about 25 years.
